MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS JOEL JASSO AND TRICHA JASSO'S MOTION TO LIFT STAY ON ACTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT LIFTS THE STAY TO ALLOW THIRD PARTY DISCOVERY AND DISCOVERY AGAINST DEFENDANT THAT DOES NOT IMPLICATE HIS FIFTH AMENDMENT RIGHTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Lift Stay On Action
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS JOEL JASSO and TRICHA JASSO'S Motion To Lift Stay On Action is granted in part and denied in part. The court lifts the stay to allow third party discovery and discovery against defendant that does not implicate his Fifth Amendment rights. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)
